sources.name: CDP Supply Chain
sources.description_snippet: Major channel through which customers request supplier emissions data. Supply-chain program scale makes it relevant to forwarder data strategy.
sources.notes_snippet:
Annual disclosure cycle. Increasingly tied to procurement decisions.
